2605.09347.title: Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic
2605.09347.paper_summary: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.
2605.09347.paper_summary_zh: 離散變數在許多應用中很常見，例如概率推理、規劃和可解釋的人工智慧。當符號推理技術被用於這些應用時，處理離散變數的標準技術是將其二元化為布林變數，以便使用布林計算機械，例如SAT求解器。然而，這種技術可能面臨計算和語義上的挑戰。在本研究中，我們開發了一個針對離散邏輯的原生SAT求解器，這是布林邏輯的直接擴展，其中變數可以取任意值。我們提出的求解器在設計上與布林SAT求解器相似，具有單元解析和子句學習等組件，但這些組件是在離散變數上原生運作。我們通過將開發的SAT求解器與應用於離散CNF的CSP求解器、應用於二元化CNF的布林SAT求解器以及一些混合求解器進行實證比較，來說明所開發SAT求解器的優點。
2605.09347.author: Yaofang Zhang et.al.
2605.09347.authors: Yaofang Zhang, Ken Zhou, Adnan Darwiche
